title: helenium heterophyllum
intro: Helenium heterophyllum, also known as sneezeweed or bitterweed, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helenium heterophyllum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as congestion and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Helenium heterophyllum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
